behaviors.description: Valid JSON payloads containing markdown-heavy strings parse successfully and proceed through normal hook input handling.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at parser->hook-handler handoff, not just JSON.parse alone. REAL-INFRA: behavior text does not require real stdin/process/network. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Integration (setup: call hook input entry with valid JSON containing code fences/backticks/$vars; assertion: parsed object reaches normal handler and no parse-failure trace; catches: escaping/field-handoff bugs). Adjacent Unit (setup: test parser function only; assertion: returns object; catches parse logic bugs but can miss handler wiring regressions). Rejection-gate for System: behavior says only 'parse successfully and proceed through normal hook input handling' (no real process requirement).
behaviors.test_description: Wire parser + normal hook-input handler in-process; feed valid markdown-heavy JSON strings and assert normal handling path is taken (success result/next-stage call) with no json_parse_failed trace.

behaviors.description: Truly malformed JSON payloads produce a `json_parse_failed` trace record with enough context to diagnose the malformed section.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: parser error + trace-record construction/context formatting spans modules. REAL-INFRA: no explicit need for OS/subprocess in this behavior. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Integration (setup: malformed JSON through in-process hook input pipeline with trace sink stub; assertion: json_parse_failed emitted with location/snippet context; catches: lost parse context or wrong trace mapping). Adjacent Unit (setup: parser only; assertion: throws parse error; catches syntax detection only, misses trace payload quality). Rejection-gate for System: text requires malformed payload -> trace record, but not 'real process execution'.
behaviors.test_description: Run parser + trace emission path in-process with malformed JSON; assert `json_parse_failed` trace includes diagnostic context (e.g., error position/snippet or equivalent malformed-section metadata).

behaviors.description: The local error-policy path maps parse failure to a handled result (no throw) and marks telemetry intent.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure requires handoff from parse-failure object into policy mapper + telemetry intent marker. REAL-INFRA: explicitly 'local error-policy path' disqualifies System. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Integration (setup: inject parse failure into policy path with telemetry collector; assertion: returns handled result without throw and telemetry intent flag set; catches: exception leak or missing telemetry mark). Adjacent Unit (setup: pure mapping function; assertion: maps one error to one result; catches local logic only, may miss wiring to telemetry marker). Rejection-gate for System: behavior text says 'local error-policy path'.
behaviors.test_description: Exercise in-process error-policy module wired with telemetry intent recorder; provide parse-failure input and assert non-throw handled outcome plus telemetry intent marked.

behaviors.description: In real process execution, malformed stdin does not crash the hook process and still emits the expected trace signal before exit.
behaviors.justification: REAL-INFRA: behavior explicitly requires 'real process execution' and malformed stdin handling before process exit; subprocess/OS stdin semantics are the failure boundary. MOCK-HIDE: in-process fakes can miss crash/exit-order issues. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: System (setup: spawn hook process, pipe malformed stdin; assertion: process does not crash and expected trace signal emitted before exit; catches: real stdin buffering/exit-race crashes). Adjacent Integration (setup: call main handler with fake stream; assertion: handled error; misses subprocess lifecycle faults). Rejection-gate for Agentic/Workflow: no AI model call or multi-agent sequence in behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Spawn the actual hook executable as a subprocess, feed malformed stdin bytes, and assert stable exit behavior (no crash) plus expected parse-failure trace emission prior to termination.

behaviors.description: A real hook invocation path (stdin -> parser -> trace sink) produces the expected trace artifact when malformed input is supplied.
behaviors.justification: REAL-INFRA: 'real hook invocation path (stdin -> parser -> trace sink)' implies exercising true entrypoint and runtime plumbing. MOCK-HIDE: mocked stdin/sink can hide integration bugs in real invocation wiring/artifact emission timing/format. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: System (setup: execute real hook entrypoint with malformed stdin and real configured trace sink; assertion: expected trace artifact exists/contains parse-failure signal; catches: broken end-to-end wiring). Adjacent Integration (setup: call pipeline in-process with fake sink; assertion: sink receives event; can miss real invocation/env/path issues). Rejection-gate for Agentic/Workflow: no model decision path in behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real hook command with malformed stdin and verify the produced trace artifact from the actual sink (file/log/collector used by runtime) contains the expected parse-failure signal.

behaviors.description: Regression tests distinguish malformed-JSON failures from valid-markdown payloads, preventing false attribution to markdown content itself.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: distinction depends on parser + classification/trace decision path across modules for two contrasting inputs. REAL-INFRA: behavior does not require subprocess/OS. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Integration (setup: run same in-process hook-input pipeline with (a) valid markdown-heavy JSON and (b) malformed JSON; assertion: only malformed case emits json_parse_failed while valid case follows normal path; catches: false attribution regressions). Adjacent Unit (setup: parser-only param tests; assertion: one parses, one fails; misses regression in downstream failure labeling). Rejection-gate for System: no 'real process' wording here (that requirement is covered by behaviors 4/5).
behaviors.test_description: Create paired regression cases in the in-process pipeline: valid markdown-rich JSON vs genuinely malformed JSON; assert mutually exclusive outcomes (success path vs parse-failure trace) to guard against markdown-blame regressions.
